channel.title: DailyBite — Daily Food Deals
channel.description: The best verified food deals, updated every morning.

item.title: Shake Shack: 🌭 National Hot Dog Day: Hot Dog + Fries or Lemonade for $8
item.guid: Shake Shack-🌭 National Hot Dog Day: Hot Dog + Fries-2026-07-15
item.description: Use code SUMMERDOG at the app, website, or in-restaurant kiosk to get a classic hot dog paired with classic fries or lemonade. (Through July 19, 2026)

item.title: Panera Bread: 2 Items for $4.99 Each (Mix & Match)
item.guid: Panera Bread-2 Items for $4.99 Each (Mix & Match)-2026-07-15
item.description: Pick any two eligible half sandwiches or salads and pay just $4.99 per item — a notable markdown from regular prices. (Limited time)

item.title: McDonald's: $5 McValue Meal Deal
item.description: Get a McDouble or McChicken plus 4-piece Chicken McNuggets, small fries, and a small Coca-Cola for $5 in the app. (Limited time)

item.title: Domino's: $9.99 Any Pizza, Any Crust, Up to 7 Toppings
item.guid: Domino's-$9.99 Any Pizza, Any Crust, Up to 7 Topp-2026-07-15
item.description: Order any pizza online or in-app with any crust — including Parmesan Stuffed Crust — for just $9.99 each (excludes XL and Specialty pizzas). (Through July 26, 2026)

item.title: KFC: $5 Five Tenders + 2 Sauces
item.description: Score five crispy chicken tenders and two KFC sauces for just $5 — valid online, in-app, and in-store at participating locations. (Ongoing)

item.title: Taco Bell: Cravings Value Menu: 10 Items for $3 or Less
item.guid: Taco Bell-Cravings Value Menu: 10 Items for $3 or -2026-07-15
item.description: Taco Bell's Luxe Value Menu features fan favorites like the Cheesy Bean & Rice Burrito and Spicy Potato Soft Taco all priced at $3 or under. (Ongoing)

item.title: Sonic Drive-In: $1.99 Everyday Menu
item.description: Jr. Bacon Cheeseburger, Chicken Wrap, and other menu favorites available every day for just $1.99 — great for late-night runs. (Ongoing)

item.title: Wendy's: Free Frosty or $2 Off Breakfast Combo in App
item.guid: Wendy's-Free Frosty or $2 Off Breakfast Combo in-2026-07-15
item.description: Open the Wendy's app to unlock a free Frosty or save $2 on a Breakfast Combo at participating locations. (Limited time)

item.title: Burger King: App Coupons: $5 Biscuit Meal & $8.99 Whopper Meal
item.description: Burger King's app features daily rotating coupons, including a $5 Biscuit Meal and a discounted $8.99 Whopper Combo Meal. (Ongoing)

item.title: Del Taco: Del's Real Deals Value Menu from $1
item.guid: Del Taco-Del's Real Deals Value Menu from $1-2026-07-15
item.description: Late-night staple Del Taco has tacos, burritos, and rollers starting at just $1 on their everyday Del's Real Deals value menu. (Ongoing)

item.title: Wingstop: $16.99 Boneless Meal Deal (Soccer Season)
item.description: Wingstop's revived fan-favorite Boneless Meal Deal is back for the summer soccer season at $16.99, loaded with boneless wings. (Limited time)

item.title: Pizza Hut: $10 Any Large Pizza Carryout
item.guid: Pizza Hut-$10 Any Large Pizza Carryout-2026-07-15
item.description: Carry out any large pizza for just $10 at participating Pizza Hut locations, including their new Big New Yorker and personal pizzas. (Ongoing)

item.title: Dairy Queen: $7 Meal Deal (Chicken Strips or Cheeseburger)
item.guid: Dairy Queen-$7 Meal Deal (Chicken Strips or Cheesebu-2026-07-15
item.description: Get a 3-piece Chicken Strip Meal Deal or Original Cheeseburger Meal Deal including fries, drink, and sundae for just $7. (Ongoing)

item.title: IHOP: Free Kids' Entree with Adult Entree (Dine-In)
item.guid: IHOP-Free Kids' Entree with Adult Entree -2026-07-15
item.description: Kids under 12 eat completely free with the purchase of any full-priced adult entree — valid for dine-in at participating locations. (Limited time)
